final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] counter
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        counter <= 4'b0;
    end else begin
        counter <= counter + 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      counter <= counter - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
